_doc: Committed, self-contained precision fixture. Thresholds + corpus + labels are pinned HERE, before precision_ab.py runs, so the gate is independently reproducible (not self-defined at run time). The corpus is materialized to a tempdir, indexed, and queried. The live 'agent adopts recall instead of re-deriving' half is NOT measured here — it is post-hoc (see post-reload-verification.md).

# Validation log

## APPROACH — D1
**Method:** integration-test
**Domains:** auth
**Approach:** spin up the auth service in a docker container and hit /login; run the end-to-end test in the container first before any unit tests.

## GOTCHA — D2
**Domains:** auth
**Lost time on:** mocking the token refresh in unit tests
**Do instead:** exercise the real refresh against the containerized service.

# Validation log

## APPROACH — D1
**Method:** cli

**Approach:** build the FTS5 full-text index and assert bm25 ranking via the sqlite3 CLI.

# Spec
A different abandoned approach: run the login flow without any container.

queries.name: aborted-not-surfaced-as-precedent
queries._note: Only the aborted stub contains 'abandoned'; it is status-excluded, so recall returns nothing — proving aborted work is never surfaced as precedent.
